sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105232" key="triskata/ptustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρισ-κατάπτυστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105232.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrice-abominable,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:165" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.165</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
